pages.title: Processor Unit
pages.text: The silicon heart of your operations. The Processor Unit is the primary component responsible for generating $(l:logicore:architecture/cycles)Cycles$().$(br)$(br)It must be installed in $(l:logicore:machines/server_rack)Server Racks$() or $(l:logicore:machines/computer)Computers$(). Without a processor, these machines are inert—producing nothing even if connected to power.
Basic version of the processor capable of producing 1000 $(l:logicore:architecture/cycles)Cycles$() per processor.
Advanced version of the processor capable of producing 5000 $(l:logicore:architecture/cycles)Cycles$() per processor.
Ultimate version of the processor capable of producing 10000 $(l:logicore:architecture/cycles)Cycles$() per processor.
